{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Ninecloud records
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud records]] contain speculation about [[Sage]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
